new_classes.label_en: PDO wine (white), other, in containers > 2 l and ≤ 10 l (CN 2204 22 38)
new_classes.label_de: Wein mit geschützter Ursprungsbezeichnung (g.U.), weiß, anderer, in Behältnissen mit mehr als 2 l und höchstens 10 l (KN 2204 22 38)
new_classes.definition_en: White wine with a protected designation of origin (PDO/g.U.), other than Tokaj, presented in containers holding more than 2 litres and not more than 10 litres (medium containers), as defined in additional note 6(a) to Chapter 22 of the CN.

coverage_explanation:
The axioms capture the three main discriminating criteria for CN 2204 22 38: (1) PDO/g.U. wine quality, (2) white wine colour, (3) container volume > 2 l and ≤ 10 l (MediumContainer2To10L), and (4) exclusion of Tokaj (CN 2204 22 33) and the separately coded PDO white wine at CN 2204 22 26. 

The coverage is not 1.0 for the following reasons:
- The legal text references additional note 6(a) to Chapter 22, which specifies the precise regulatory definition of PDO wines. The content of that additional note is not provided in the legal text supplied, so the finer criteria it contains (e.g., specific EU wine regulation references, exact PDO scope) cannot be fully formalised.
- CN 2204 22 26 (already in TBox) covers white PDO wine in medium containers; CN 2204 22 38 is described as "other" PDO white wine in medium containers. The precise distinction between 22042226 and 22042238 within the white PDO medium-container tier is not fully elaborated in the provided note text, limiting complete formalisation of the sibling boundary.
- The complement restrictions use the product class IRIs (not a producedBy restriction), which is a structural approximation for disjointness against siblings.
